infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Steward uses your camera to log meals from photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Steward reads meal photos from your library to log them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Steward records short voice notes so the coach can transcribe and log them.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Steward reads sleep, steps, and workouts from HealthKit so the morning briefing has context.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Steward does not write to HealthKit.

plugins.cameraPermission: Steward uses your camera to log meals from photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Steward reads meal photos from your library to log them.
